rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO TERMINATE CONSERVATORSHIP OF ESTATE
PETITION TO TERMINATE CONSERVATORSHIP OF PERSON AND ESTATE
PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF CONSERVATOR OF ESTATE

Notice Of Hearing And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings On The Verified Cross-Complint Of Elizabeth Acosta For Indemnification; Professional Negligence; Fraud And Misrepresentation; Request For Judicial Notice; Proof Of Service By Mail

Notice Of Motion And Motion, To Compel Verified Non-Objection Responses To Request For Admission Of Facts And Genuineness Of Documents, Form And Special Interrogatories; Memo. Of Points And Auth.; Request For Imposition Of Sanctions; Decl. Of Ronald M. Toran; And Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: Matter on Calendar for Thursday, July 12, 2007. Petitioner Debra Dolch's Motion to Compel Verified Non-Objection Responses to Request For Admission of Facts and Genuineness of Documents, Form and Special Interrogatories granted, to wit: responding party Randy Redding shall serve verified responses to Request For Admission of Facts and Genuineness of Documents, and Form and Special Interrogatories within 10 days of the date of this Order; a) If verified responses to Form and Special Interrogatories are not served within 10 days, as ordered, all objections raised in responding parties unverified responses shall be deemed waived; b) If verified responses to Request For Admission of Facts and Genuineness of Documents are not served within 10 days, as ordered, all requests for admission and genuineness of documents set forth therein shall be deemed admitted; c) Request for sanctions granted in the sum of $300.00. = (610/PS)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Cross-Complaint Of Elizabeth Acosta; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Demurrer is sustained as to First Cause of Action, with leave to amend Demurrer is overruled as to Second Cause of Action Demurrer is overruled as to Third Cause of Action Demurrer is sustained as to Fourth Cause of Action, with leave to amend
